biography: Kristian, a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, is known for his calm demeanor and strategic approach to the game. Representing the Master Golf Club, Kristian is always a popular player among the fans.

While the coveted Hector Trophée and the Victor Trophy have eluded him thus far, Kristian's consistent presence in the tournament speaks volumes about his dedication and skill. With three past appearances, Kristian has proven his mettle on the course and seems poised to make his fourth appearance in 2026.

Off the course, Kristian is known for his sportsmanship and willingness to mentor younger players. His positive attitude makes him a valuable asset to any team, and his fellow competitors often seek his advice.
